title: Django AI UI runtime foundation
objective: Extract common Django-side actor context, signing, UI driver selection and config payload logic out of CopilotKit-specific views.
non_goals: Do not remove the legacy sidebar.
Do not change domain tools or gateway behavior.
Do not introduce browser-side write actions.
acceptance_checks: LOCAL_BUSINESS_AI_UI_DRIVER supports legacy, copilotkit and native values.
Actor payload signing is implemented in a neutral module.
CopilotKit config path continues to work or has a compatible alias.
Templates select the sidebar driver through the common setting.
